tvShow.name: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality
tvShow.overview: A poor and ordinary boy from a village joins a minor sect in Jiang Hu and becomes an Unofficial Disciple by chance. How will Han Li, a commoner by birth, establish a foothold for himself in his sect? With his mediocre aptitude, he must successfully traverse the treacherous path of cultivation and avoid the notice of those who may do him harm. This is a story of an ordinary mortal who, against all odds, clashes with devilish demons and ancient celestials in order to find his own path towards immortality.

episodes.name: Ordinary man
episodes.overview: Han Li was born in poverty and was the lintel of the Guangmen Gate. He participated in the examination of Qixuanmen in his childhood.

episodes.name: Doctor Mo
episodes.overview: Han Li accepted the mysterious Dr. Mo Mo by Qixuanmen as a disciple because of his spiritual roots, he could practice "Changchun Gong".

episodes.name: Green Jade Bottle
episodes.overview: During the period, Han Li picked up a small bottle against the sky and could be used for unlimited ripe plants.

episodes.name: Anti-Kill
episodes.overview: Doctor Mo originally wanted to wait for Han Li to practice Changchun Jue and seized him after Xiao Cheng. As a result, Han Li was also poisoned by him. He had to find Dr. Mo Mo's family to solve the medicine.

episodes.name: Human Beings are Possible
episodes.overview: Han Li found that his friend Tiezhu was refined as an iron corpse, and he could control the use of soul bells.

episodes.name: The Master of the Golden Light
episodes.overview: Han Li saved the rain. Qixuanmen and Wild Wolf Gang were still fighting. When the people were preparing to kill the ring, Han Li appeared to stop and kill each other. After the incident, Li Feiyu understood that Han Ri would leave immediately, and the two cherished each other. Li Feiyu may take care of Han Li's family.

episodes.name: Mofu Marriage
episodes.overview: After Han Li left Qixuanmen, he embarked on the road of Xiu Xian. He saw Dr. Mo Mo's family in Jiayuan City and helped the Mo family solve the crisis. Later, I visited Taonan Valley and met with a kind Wan Xiaoshan and accompanied. Go home before travelling and see the last farewell.

episodes.name: Go Home
episodes.overview: Han Liyuan looked at the married sister and the long -lost father and mother, leaving the hand rope of elixir and silver, and the younger sister at home, and made the final farewell to embark on the road of Xiu Xian. In the Taonan Primary School, he used elixir with Han Yunzhi to exchange magic and residual films that can hide the items and the rune pen Jinzhu who drawn the rune.

episodes.name: Qualifications for the Ascention Conference
episodes.overview: Coincidentally, Han Li joined Huang Fenggu, one of the seven major cultivation martial arts of the Vietnam Kingdom with the Shengxian order, and officially embarked on the road of Xiu Xian. After joining Huangfeng Valley, Han Li relied on his own police and the mysterious small bottle to quickly improve.

episodes.name: Foundation Pill
episodes.overview: Han Li got a free Tsukanni -Gan given by the martial arts. Brother Lu rushed out. Uncle Wu came out to stop, but in the end, he took it by Brother Lu. If you want to build a foundation, you must take Tsuken Kidan. If you want to refine the foundation, you must get the medicinal materials of Dan Fang and Refining Tibin.

episodes.name: Fragrent
episodes.overview: In order to obtain Jidan, Han Li must enter the blood -coloured banned land to find medicinal materials, so you must make corresponding preparations for entering the blood forbidden ground.

episodes.name: Bloody Forbidden Land
episodes.overview: The seven gates gathered at the entrance of the blood -coloured ban, and the elders of the martial arts opened the door to prohibit. Han Li entered with each of the disciples.

episodes.name: Killing in Forbidden Areas
episodes.overview: The disciples who enter the forbidden area, in order to compete for medicinal materials and treasures, have launched the killing of you to fight for me

episodes.name: Mythical Beast Ink Jiao
episodes.overview: In order not to be killed by the killing of the treasure, Han Li intentionally avoided everyone, hid into the cave, and hid the moon Zongnan Palace Wan and others to enter it, met with their lunar old gods and beasts, and then started a war.

episodes.name: Nangong Wan
episodes.overview: Han Li and Nangong Wan joined forces to successfully kill Mo Jiao, and under the influence of unintentionally touching the ink Jiao's sack, Han Li and Nangong Wan smashed the phoenix.

episodes.name: Xiuxian Cave House
episodes.overview: Completed the foundation building by swallowing a large number of foundation building pills, and guided the excess medicinal power to practice the Qingyuan Sword Art to the fourth level (later learned that the Qingyuan Sword Art is not complete). Afterwards, he found a place to open up a cave house through the sect of spirit beasts, which contained the fountain of spiritual eyes. In order to strengthen the Dongfu Magic Array, the shops in the town were built to form clouds, and the thousand-year-old spirit grass was exchanged for the incomplete upside-down five-element array.

episodes.name: Qianzhujiao
episodes.overview: Senior Brother Wu discovered that Senior Brother Ye was actually a spy in Huang Fenggu, and made a secret deal with Zhong Wu, the "Spirit Beast Mountain". Later, Senior Brother Wu was hunted down by Senior Brother Ye's puppet, and happened to be bumped into by Han Li who was driven back to the cave. Han Li immediately rescued Senior Brother Wu and fled back to the cave, and used the unfinished upside-down five-element formation to resist the puppet onslaught. At the critical moment, Lei Wanhe rushed to kill Senior Brother Ye at the stage of forming pills. Brother Wu died in this battle, and Han Li also obtained the Great Evolution of the Thousand Bamboo Sect in Brother Ye's storage bag.

episodes.name: Take Xuan'er to the Trial
episodes.overview: The master looked at Han Li and liked it more and more. He said that he would bring you to meet someone. This is your master's senior sister. We decided to let you take Xuan'er to the Yanjiabao for the trial. Han Li bowed and said to the master, "I'm actually humble." When you go to the forbidden area, there will inevitably be enemies that you can't fight. The master heard what he meant and asked Han Li to choose the exercises.

episodes.name: Mysterious Man's Blood Spirit Formation
episodes.overview: Seeing that the mysterious person actually used the vitality of a living person to exchange the vitality of Yan'er, the elder Yan Lei pleaded with the castle master, saying that he did not know people well, and hoped that the castle master would not cooperate with the mysterious man. The castle master said that I was not for my daughter. The reason why we have a gap with the seven major sects is because of the lack of Nascent Soul cultivators.

episodes.name: Yanjiabao Encountered the Ghost Spirit Gate
episodes.overview: Han Li saw that the junior sister was so unreasonable, so Xiao Er would just open a second-class room for us. When the people in the inn saw Xuan'er leaving, they persuaded Han Li to be okay. It was normal for couples to quarrel. There was a sound from overhead. Han Li saw Xuan'er and claimed that he had a mission to say goodbye to Miss Mo. When he came upstairs and found several dead people, he hurriedly chased after him to the inn, and saw a masked man grabbing Xuan'er to prepare. Take away and force the masked man away. The next day, two people came to the castle owner to report the activity, only then did they know that the masked man was from the ghost door.

episodes.name: Han Li forces Wang Chan to Retreat
episodes.overview: The blood spirit formation was closed, and all the people inside were taken away from the spiritual power before they were all killed. After a fight, Han Li used poison to force Wang Chan back, but he was also injured. He rode forward in the flying boat and met Miss Mo. Although she knew that Miss Mo liked him, the two of them were doomed to fail. Li still asked Miss Mo to follow the caravan to Xuguo Mall, and left alone.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 1
episodes.overview: The Lingshi ore vein is the mineral of the Devil's Spirit Gate. After the Yanjiabao War, Han Li was recruited by Xuan Le and Lu Tianmeng to be a strong man to crack the four evil formations. Although Han Li was at the early stage of foundation building, it was difficult for anyone in the middle stage of foundation building to beat him. This time, Han Li performed well and successfully conquered the spirit stone ore vein...

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 2
episodes.overview: For Han Li, although Lingshi is attractive enough, he still prefers to be safe. If you are looking for a spiritual stone here, I am afraid that it will be damaged here. Han Li has always been alert, and he has long sensed danger. So Han Li didn't want to stay here for too long. Before Wang Chan arrived, he had already prepared in advance. He didn't stop for a moment, and trot all the way into the cave...

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 3
episodes.overview: Wang Chan was teased by Han Li and scolded by his father. In order to understand the hatred in his heart, Wang Chan personally led the team to deal with Han Li, and used the Qingyang Demon Fire to destroy the defensive formation. As for Han Li, he had already escaped from the mines, but he was discovered by Xuan Le and Lu Tianmeng...

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 4
episodes.overview: After meeting the White Jade Spider, everyone had to face the monster together. The three of them had their own ghosts. They didn't try their best to kill the monster, but attacked the monster and calculated each other. Han Li cheated to death, Xuan Le pretended to be defensive, and killed Lu Tianmeng. In the end, Han Li relied on the puppet to attract spiders, and lured the enemy to use the spider monster to kill Xuan Le again...

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 5
episodes.overview: Han Li had to deal with the blood jade spider alone after his teammates were killed in battle. He first attacked the spider's back with his magic weapon, and found that the magic weapon was bounced off. Only then did I realize that spiders have mana protection and can't resist hard, so I immediately chose to run away. Although he was very cautious, Han Li did not hesitate and released three puppet beasts to fight the monsters. After it is no longer blue, break the defense and you can kill with one hit. When escaping from the ground, you meet the injured Chen Qiaoqian. After rescuing her, they go on the road together. Using the excuse of healing, she takes Wangyoudan and forgets everything that happened recently. .

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 6
episodes.overview: Han Li's puppet skills were getting better and better. A magician monk was killed by three puppet lizards who were forced to molest him on a cliff. This is Jinguyuan, the location of the camp of the seven sects. The monks of the seven sects can exchange for the jade slips of military merit by killing the monks. The jade slips can be used for various spiritual stones and medicinal pills. Old Demon Han is a cautious and careful person, and he knows the truth of not revealing his wealth, so he changed to the cheapest tree-leaf-shaped magic weapon and flew to the camp...

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 7
episodes.overview: In the woods, a yellow-clothed woman was chasing three demon cultivators. This person was Dong Xuaner. It turned out that Dong Xuaner had been obsessed with her since she was rescued by Han Li. Hong Fu was afraid that she would be possessed by a demon and would let Dong Xuaner retreat and practice in the cave. After the retreat, Dong Xuan'er's strength has greatly increased, and she can easily one-on-one three demon cultivators, but unexpectedly she still loses to the young master of the demon cultivator, and was caught while eavesdropping on their conversation...

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 8
episodes.overview: Han Li accepted the task of protecting the capital from his master's gate, but declined Senior Sister Chen's invitation to show his favor (he was caught by Nangong Wan), and took Nangong Wan's flying boat to the capital nervously.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 9
episodes.overview: In order to be safe, Han Li did not disembark halfway and diverted, and sent Zhu Yan Dan to accidentally stimulate a wave of Nangong Wan again... After Wanbao Pavilion found Qi Yunxiao and rescued him on the way, he saw his partner who was cautious and smart but suffering. Xin Ruyin, who is terminally ill, asked to restore the ancient teleportation array

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 10
episodes.overview: After dispelling Qi Yunxiao Xin Ruyin's concerns and saying that after repairing the formation, Han Li came to the capital and settled in Qin Mansion, the home of the ancients of Shimen.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 11
episodes.overview: Han Li discovered that the capital was not as peaceful as it seemed. Someone was arresting Luodan Sanxiu. When he attended the evening banquet in the palace with the Qin family, he found that the housekeeper had a different cultivation atmosphere, and as a guest immortal master of the palace, a low-level monk's exquisite fire control aroused his interest.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 12
episodes.overview: Han Li's palace investigates the magic cultivator, and once again encounters and stops Mo Caihuan, who wants to seek revenge from the palace steward.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 13
episodes.overview: Mo Caihuan secretly sent information to Han Li, and then Mengshan's 5-1 friends rescued the loose cultivators in the outer stronghold, forcing them out of the palace and asking the people behind the scenes to encircle and suppress them.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 14
episodes.overview: Mo Caihuan secretly sent information to Han Li, and then Mengshan's 5-1 friends rescued the loose cultivators in the outer stronghold, forcing them out of the palace and asking the people behind the scenes to encircle and suppress them.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 15
episodes.overview: Continue the fight in the previous episode, kill Butler Wang to avenge Mo Caihuan and catch the little prince

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 16
episodes.overview: After defeating and eradicating the external forces of the cult, Han Li learned from the young prince's memory that the headquarters of the cult was underground in the palace, so he dismissed Mengshan's 5-1 friends and prepared to wait for the support of the teacher to arrive before entering the palace. Decided to wait for the leader to go out of the customs and then solve the problem. During the same period, the front-line battle between the Seven Sects and the Demon Sect also escalated anxiously.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 17
episodes.overview: Dong Xuan'er came to the Hehuan Sect to meet her father and was accepted as a direct disciple. Han Li waited until the brothers and sisters to help plan to sneak into the palace to eradicate the black evil sect

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 18
episodes.overview: Han Li and his senior brothers and sisters were visiting the night market in the garden. Mo Caihuan saw it with emotion and left in a daze. Han Li pretended not to know how to downplay the emotional entanglement. The senior brothers who were unwilling to form a group to visit the palace before encountered the evil spirit hair caregiver who came out to find Han Li, lost to him and was captured. Han Li stepped on the palace area and arranged the formation in advance to prepare for the backhand.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 19
episodes.overview: After Han Li and others planned and prepared before the war, Chen Qiaoqian showed his affection, attacked the cold palace at night, and the battle of the palace began

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 20
episodes.overview: Palace battle continues

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 21
episodes.overview: In the third part of the battle of the palace, the situation was tense, and in the end, Senior Brother Liu used the Phoenix True Treasure to clear the field.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 22
episodes.overview: The battle of the palace continues, and everyone faces the leader

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 23
episodes.overview: Brother Liu Jing died in battle. Han Li held back the Heisha leader and asked Qiaoqian to lead Wei Niang and Senior Brother Song to start the formation.

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 24
episodes.overview: The leader of the Heisha was trapped in an upside-down Yin-Yang Five Elements Formation, experienced the Five Elements and Vientiane Illusions, and was destroyed by Han Li's power of the Fubaoping Tianqi. But the sect master did not slaughter, but instead used the power of the five elements to restore the body, and prepared to refine the five elements...

episodes.name: Battle of Magic 25
episodes.overview: Wei Niang used the True Phoenix Talisman to reduce the leader to ashes. After each left the capital, Han Li's mission in the capital ended.

episodes.name: Farewell to Tiannan 1
episodes.overview: Han Li came to the Siping Restaurant in Jiayuan City, and met the second shopkeeper of the year. After inquiries, he learned that the Mo Mansion no longer existed. After that, he regained the soul-inducing bell and found the soul of the song that had long been occupied by the cultivators of Yulingzong...

episodes.name: Farewell to Tiannan 2
episodes.overview: To be cautious, Han Li went to the cave alone, and was attacked by the golden-backed monster beetle, losing a lot of magical tools.

episodes.name: Farewell to Tiannan 3
episodes.overview: Han Li returned to the cave, not only defeated the golden-backed monster beetle, but also harvested the storage bag of the cultivator of the Royal Spirit Sect, and returned to Huangfeng Valley to report the incident. And Ling Beast Mountain took the opportunity to take refuge in the magic way, and the strength of the seven factions allied forces dropped sharply. . . .

episodes.name: Farewell to Tiannan 4
episodes.overview: Han Li's report was fruitless, so he sent a letter to the front line, but he was intercepted and destroyed by Elder Han. After arriving at the Baiyao Garden, Senior Brother Ma reminded Han Li to prepare early. At this time, the appointment of viewing chrysanthemums with Chen Qiaoqian before the war came as scheduled...

episodes.name: Farewell to Tiannan 5
episodes.overview: Qiaoqian has no intention of being affectionate, and Han Li bids farewell to him at Baiju Mountain. At this time, the seven sects fought with all their strength to face the demon army, and the two sides were caught in a fierce battle.

episodes.name: Farewell to Tiannan 6
episodes.overview: Song Meng and Wei Niang were intercepted by Pink Skull and Elder Han, but Fu Yunzi rescued them in time. The front line was defeated, the ancestor of Huangfenggu Linghu came forward, but the general trend was gone. . . .

seasons.name: Season 1
seasons.overview: A poor and ordinary boy from a village joins a minor sect in Jiang Hu and becomes an Unofficial Disciple by chance. How will Han Li, a commoner by birth, establish a foothold for himself in in his sect? With his mediocre aptitude, he must successfully traverse the treacherous path of cultivation and avoid the notice of those who may do him harm. This is a story of an ordinary mortal who, against all odds, clashes with devilish demons and ancient celestials in order to find his own path towards immortality.
